title: Reply To Mode By Chat Type
Memory Backend
snippet: Memory backend ("builtin" for PowerDirector embeddings, "qmd" for QMD sidecar).

title: QMD Binary
snippet: Path to the qmd binary (default: resolves from PATH).

title: QMD Include Default Memory
snippet: Whether to automatically index MEMORY.md + memory/**/*.md (default: true).

title: QMD Extra Paths
snippet: Additional directories/files to index with QMD (path + optional glob pattern).

title: QMD Session Indexing
snippet: Enable QMD session transcript indexing (experimental, default: false).

title: QMD Session Export Directory
snippet: Override directory for sanitized session exports before indexing.

title: QMD Session Retention (days)
snippet: Retention window for exported sessions before pruning (default: unlimited).

title: QMD Update Interval
snippet: How often the QMD sidecar refreshes indexes (duration string, default: 5m).

title: QMD Update Debounce (ms)
snippet: Minimum delay between successive QMD refresh runs (default: 15000).

title: QMD Update on Startup
snippet: Run QMD update once on gateway startup (default: true).

title: QMD Wait for Boot Sync
snippet: Block startup until the boot QMD refresh finishes (default: false).

title: QMD Embed Interval
snippet: How often QMD embeddings are refreshed (duration string, default: 60m). Set to 0 to disable periodic embed.

title: QMD Command Timeout (ms)
snippet: Timeout for QMD maintenance commands like collection list/add (default: 30000).

title: QMD Max Results
snippet: Max QMD results returned to the agent loop (default: 6).

title: QMD Max Snippet Chars
snippet: Max characters per snippet pulled from QMD (default: 700).

title: QMD Max Injected Chars
snippet: Max total characters injected from QMD hits per turn.

title: QMD Surface Scope
snippet: Session/channel scope for QMD recall (same syntax as session.sendPolicy; default: direct-only).

title: Plugin Allowlist
snippet: Optional allowlist of plugin ids; when set, only listed plugins load.

title: Plugin Denylist
snippet: Optional denylist of plugin ids; deny wins over allowlist.

title: Plugin Load Paths
snippet: Additional plugin files or directories to load.

title: Plugin Slots
snippet: Select which plugins own exclusive slots (memory, etc.).

title: Memory Plugin
snippet: Select the active memory plugin by id, or "none" to disable memory plugins.

title: Plugin Entries
snippet: Per-plugin settings keyed by plugin id (enable/disable + config payloads).

title: Plugin Enabled
snippet: Overrides plugin enable/disable for this entry (restart required).

title: Plugin Config
snippet: Plugin-defined config payload (schema is provided by the plugin).
